name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2004 Category A5 - Buffer Overflows
description: This is a category grouping weaknesses related to the A5 category in the OWASP Top Ten 2004, covering buffer overflow vulnerabilities including improper restriction of operations within memory buffer bounds, buffer copy without size check, and use of externally-controlled format strings. Categories are informal organizational groupings and are prohibited for vulnerability mapping since 2019.
